dashboard.subtitle: Here's your health overview for today.
dashboard.recentSymptomChecksDesc: Last check: No major symptoms detected.

symptom.title: 🤖 Symptom Checker
symptom.description: Start typing a symptom and select from suggestions:

clinics.title: Clinics Nearby
clinics.description: Find clinics and hospitals close to your current location.
clinics.searchByCity: Search by City or Postal Code
clinics.locationAccuracyNote: Location access provides more accurate results for nearby clinics.
clinics.emptyHint: Click "Find Clinics Near Me" to see nearby clinics and hospitals.
clinics.errorThrottled: Please wait a moment before searching again.
clinics.errorNoClinicsNearby: No clinics found nearby. Try increasing your search area.
clinics.errorFetchClinics: Failed to fetch clinics. Try again later.
clinics.errorLocationUnavailable: Location access is unavailable. You can search using a city name, postal code, manually enter coordinates, or retry location access.
clinics.errorEnterCity: Please enter a city name or postal code.
clinics.errorEnterCoords: Please enter both latitude and longitude.
clinics.errorLatNumber: Latitude must be a valid number.
clinics.errorLonNumber: Longitude must be a valid number.
clinics.errorRateLimited: Location search is temporarily rate-limited. Please try again in a moment.
clinics.errorResolveLocation: Failed to resolve that location. Please try again later.
clinics.errorLocationNotFound: Location not found. Please check your spelling or try a different query.

login.createAccount: Create your account to get started.
login.errorEnterBoth: Please enter both email and password.
login.errorPasswordLength: Password must be at least 6 characters.

profile.loginPrompt: Please log in to view your profile.
profile.emergencyContactsDesc: Ajoutez jusqu'à 3 personnes à contacter rapidement en cas d'urgence.
profile.noContacts: Aucun contact d'urgence pour l'instant. Ajoutez-en un pour commencer.
profile.maxContactsReached: Vous avez atteint le maximum de 3 contacts d'urgence.
profile.deleteContactConfirm: Êtes-vous sûr de vouloir supprimer {{name}} de vos contacts d'urgence ?
profile.namePhoneRequired: Le nom et le téléphone sont requis.
profile.loadContactsError: Échec du chargement des contacts d'urgence.

settings.name: Name
settings.darkModeHint: Reduce eye strain in low light and improve contrast in the interface.
settings.pushNotificationsHint: Receive browser notifications when a medicine reminder is due.
settings.languageHint: Choose the language CareSync is displayed in. Your choice is saved for next time.
settings.pushPermissionDenied: Notification permission was denied. Please enable it in your browser settings.
settings.pushEnabledMsg: Push notifications enabled! You will be reminded when your medicines are due.
settings.soundAlertsHint: Play a gentle chime when a medication reminder triggers.
settings.dashboardHint: Configure which banners, quotes, stats, and cards appear on your Dashboard.
settings.exportDataHint: Download a backup of your profile, medicines, emergency contacts, and settings.
settings.resetDataHint: Clear stored preferences and reset to default application state.
settings.confirmResetMsg: This will clear stored local preferences and reset all settings to defaults. Are you sure?

footer.description: Helping users manage medications, monitor symptoms, and locate nearby healthcare services through a simple and accessible platform.
footer.madeWith: Made with 💚 for better healthcare management

family.title: Gestion de la santé familiale
family.subtitle: Suivez les profils de santé des membres de votre famille dont vous prenez soin.
family.addTitle: Ajouter un membre de la famille
family.editTitle: Modifier le membre de la famille
family.name: Nom
family.emptyState: Aucun membre de la famille ajouté pour l'instant. Ajoutez-en un pour suivre sa santé.
family.limitReached: Vous pouvez ajouter jusqu'à {{max}} membres de la famille.
family.deleteTitle: Supprimer le membre de la famille
family.deleteConfirm: Voulez-vous vraiment supprimer {{name}} ? Cette action est irréversible.
family.loadError: Échec du chargement des membres de la famille.
family.deleteError: Échec de la suppression du membre.

telehealth.title: Remote Telehealth
telehealth.description: Connect with local healthcare providers specialized for remote consultations.
telehealth.noProviders: No providers found in your area.
telehealth.offlineNotice: You appear to be offline or on a slow connection. Messages will be queued.

notfound.title: 404 - Page Not Found
notfound.subtitle: Oops! The page you're looking for doesn't exist.
notfound.description: It seems you've followed an invalid link or typed an unrecognized web address. Let's get you back on track with managing your health.
notfound.quickLinksTitle: Or jump directly to a feature:
notfound.dashboardDesc: Overview of your daily health & reminders
notfound.symptomDesc: AI assessment of symptoms and risk levels
notfound.clinicsDesc: Find hospitals and doctors in your area
